details.effect: Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and put it on top of its owner's deck. At the start of your end phase, give each other follower on your field [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and your leader [defense]+4.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower into an Orchis, Resolute Puppet. [evolve] [cost04]: Evolve this follower into an Orchis, Vengeful Puppet. Activate only if there are at least 3 Puppetry cards in your cemetery.
On Evolve - Summon 2 Puppet tokens. Once on each of your turns, when a Puppet you control leaves the field, put a Lloyd token into your EX area.

On Evolve - Select a Victoria on your field. It doesn't take damage this turn.

Select 2 cards named Puppet in your EX area. Transform one into a Lloyd token and the other into a Victoria token.
